_description: RBAC risk indicators per Cloud Explorer result family — privilege risk patterns, excessive permissions, and role hygiene concerns.

patterns.pattern: Standing Owner at management group/subscription scope
Service principals with Owner/Contributor at broad scope
Large privileged groups (>10 members)
Custom roles with high-scope wildcard actions
Stale role assignments (unused >90 days)

key_checks: Review standing privileged access — use PIM for JIT activation
Audit service principal permissions and credential expiry
Check for over-sized security groups with elevated roles

patterns.pattern: Storage Account Contributor/Owner at subscription scope
Storage Blob Data Contributor granted too broadly
Classic storage account key operators

key_checks: Prefer data-plane RBAC roles over account-level access
Use private endpoints to complement RBAC
Rotate storage account keys regularly

patterns.pattern: Virtual Machine Contributor with no scope limitation
VM admin login roles without MFA enforcement
Disk snapshot permissions without data classification review

key_checks: Scope VM roles to resource groups, not subscriptions
Require MFA for VM admin login roles
Review disk snapshot and export permissions

patterns.pattern: SQL Server Contributor at subscription scope
SQL DB Contributor without Azure AD-only auth
Cosmos DB Account Contributor with key access

key_checks: Enforce Azure AD-only authentication for SQL
Use database-scoped roles, not server-level Contributor
Disable Cosmos DB key-based access in favor of RBAC

patterns.pattern: Cognitive Services Contributor at broad scope
AI service key access without Azure AD enforcement
Copilot Studio environment maker without DLP

key_checks: Enforce Azure AD auth for all AI endpoints
Scope AI roles to specific resource groups
Apply DLP policies to AI agent environments

patterns.pattern: Network Contributor at subscription scope
NSG write permissions without change tracking

key_checks: Network changes should require approval workflows
Review NSG modification permissions

patterns.pattern: Security Admin role with alert suppression capability
Security Reader granted too broadly

key_checks: Separate security admin from security reader roles
Review alert suppression and policy exemption permissions

patterns.pattern: Resource Policy Contributor at management group scope
Subscription-level Owner without PIM

key_checks: Governance roles should use PIM with justification
Review policy exemption approvers
